response.global_analysis: The video begins with a dialogue between Pavolia Reine and Pochi-mama (Pochi Wanmaru) discussing Pochi-mama's 3D debut and 'Ojosama' (lady/princess) acting. The audio transitions to a performance of 'Ai♡Scream!' at 02:54. The vocals phonetically match the provided Reference JSON lyrics for the song portion. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the audio vocalizations, ensuring no early cutoffs and proper handling of mid-sentence pauses.

subtitles.original: Pochi-mama and Reine!
subtitles.english: Pochi-mama and Reine!

subtitles.original: Nobody Girl!
subtitles.english: Nobody Girl!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: お嬢様ハイテンションで 今日も素晴らしいです
subtitles.english:
Ojosama, today too you're wonderful
with your high tension.

subtitles.original: さすがです
subtitles.english: As expected.

subtitles.original: Hari ini, today... apa ya? Gimana ngomongnya?
subtitles.english: Today, today... what is it? How should I say it?

subtitles.original: Did you guys see last time Pochi-mama's 3D Ohirome?
subtitles.english: Did you guys see Pochi-mama's 3D debut last time?

subtitles.original: そう 2人で私の3Dお披露目で
subtitles.english: Yes, we sang and danced together...

subtitles.original: レイネちゃんと一緒に歌って踊りました
subtitles.english: ...at my 3D debut.

subtitles.original:
And because of that, today I invited Pochi-mama
to dance and sing on stage with me!
subtitles.english:
And because of that, today I invited Pochi-mama
to dance and sing on stage with me!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for inviting me!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for inviting me!

subtitles.original: No, thank you for coming! I had so much fun.
subtitles.english: No, thank you for coming! I had so much fun.

subtitles.original: Jadi, apa ya? Ngomongin apa ya? What should we talk about?
subtitles.english: So, what is it? What should we talk about?

subtitles.original: If I remember Pochi-mama, I remember "Ojosama".
subtitles.english: If I remember Pochi-mama, I remember "Ojosama."

subtitles.original: Because back then, I thought, "I'm a princess."
subtitles.english: Because back then, I thought, "I'm a princess."

subtitles.original: So I have to act like a princess, お嬢様だから
subtitles.english: So I have to act like a princess.

subtitles.original: 日本語で、お嬢様エキティング必要必要ってね
subtitles.english: In Japanese, "Ojosama acting" was necessary.

subtitles.original: もう、これでパーフェクトです。さっきの動きで
subtitles.english: That was perfect just now! With those movements.

subtitles.original: さっきのジャンプで。OKです。こっちの動きですか？
subtitles.english: With that jump. It was perfect. This movement?

subtitles.original: Hololive ID お嬢様！
subtitles.english: Hololive ID Ojosama!

subtitles.original: 皆さんもお嬢様になりたい方はね、contohしてください
subtitles.english:
If you want to be an Ojosama too,
please follow this example.

subtitles.original: Contohって何ですか？ Contoh apa?
subtitles.english: What is "contoh"? What example?

subtitles.original: 真似してください
subtitles.english: Please imitate me.

subtitles.original: そう！こんな動きがお嬢様ですよ！
subtitles.english: Yes! This kind of movement is what Ojosama is!

subtitles.original: 本当にいいんですかね、これで
subtitles.english: Is this really okay?

subtitles.original: ちなみに、あのネタバレになると思うんですが
subtitles.english: By the way, I think this is a spoiler...

subtitles.original: 今日のグッズはね、誕生日グッズはね
subtitles.english: ...but for today's goods, the birthday goods...

subtitles.original: Pochi-mamaが頑張りました！
subtitles.english: ...Pochi-mama worked really hard on them!

subtitles.original:
描かせていただきました！皆様グッズ紹介まで
最後までしっかり見てくださいね
subtitles.english:
I was allowed to draw them! Everyone, please
watch the goods introduction until the end.

subtitles.original:
Pokoknya, katanya jangan ke mana-mana, guys
Pokoknya tunggu sampai akhir
subtitles.english:
Anyway, don't go anywhere, guys.
Please wait until the end...

subtitles.original: Karena ada goods dari Pochi-mama sensei
subtitles.english: ...because there are goods from Pochi-mama sensei.

subtitles.original:
Kalian pasti tidak mau ketinggalan kan?
Makanya tonton sampai habis. OK?
subtitles.english:
You don't want to miss it, right?
So watch until the end. OK?

subtitles.original: OK, kalau gitu thank you Pochi-mama for coming!
subtitles.english: OK then, thank you Pochi-mama for coming!

subtitles.original: この後もライブが続くので、楽しんでね！
subtitles.english: The live will continue after this, so please enjoy!

subtitles.original: 教えて！もっとあなたの事
subtitles.english: Tell me! More about you

subtitles.original: (Tell me more, more, more, more)
subtitles.english: (Tell me more, more, more, more)

subtitles.original: 聞かせて！もっとあなたの声
subtitles.english: Let me hear! More of your voice

subtitles.original: (Let me hear more, more, more)
subtitles.english: (Let me hear more, more, more)

subtitles.original: こんなドキドキ、もう隠せない
subtitles.english: This heartbeat, I can't hide it anymore

subtitles.original: (Ai, I need you, Ai, I need you)
subtitles.english: (Ai, I need you, Ai, I need you)

subtitles.original: 目的地はDestiny、私につけてほしいの
subtitles.english: Destination is Destiny, I want you to join me

subtitles.original: (もっと教えてほしい)
subtitles.english: (I want you to tell me more)

subtitles.original: 勇気を出して
subtitles.english: Have some courage

subtitles.original: 見つめる作戦
subtitles.english: Staring strategy

subtitles.original: 瞳が合えば 止められない

subtitles.original: イェイ イェイ イェイ この恋 この愛で
subtitles.english: Yay yay yay, with this love, with this affection

subtitles.original: メロメロ とろけちゃうよ

subtitles.original: とろけちゃう 大好き

subtitles.original: アイ 愛、スクリ〜ム Scream 叫びましょ

subtitles.original: ロビちゃん！ ほーい！ なにが好き？
